creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I built it in on freebsd 10 in poudriere before I committed it, so this is a "can't reproduce" situation.

I do not care about live system building.  If it's not reproducible in poudriere, it didn't happen.  



There is also ambiguity here.  I have to assume "amd64" but this could have easily been text from i386, something I did not personally test.  Michael said he did though.
